# Phase 42 - Multi-Trace Cross-Rehearsal Coherence Audit, Five-Adapter Participation, Replay Reverification, and Drift-Stability Matrix

## Status: COMPLETE

Phase 42 ships an 8-module multi-trace cross-rehearsal coherence audit layer. Phase 42 harness: **560 / 560 PASS, 0 FAIL**. Full 35-harness regression: **8814 / 8814 PASS, 0 FAIL**. All five Phase 41 metadata-only adapters covered in success scenarios on a single audit pass. Refusal + kill-switch paths verified safe. Zero new adapters. Zero audio / TTS / subprocess / network / multiprocessing / Luna main-runtime integration. Zero production DB writes. Phase 21 remains BLOCKED.

## What Phase 42 is, in one paragraph

Phase 42 runs 8 bounded scenarios through the Phase 41 five-adapter runtime — simple English, Russian-first, mixed EN/RU code-switch, high-prosody, safety-redaction, memory-continuity, approve-false refusal, kill-switch refusal — and produces a single bundled audit. The coherence auditor verifies all five adapters were selected at least once in successful traces, every successful trace carries signed evidence + witness export + exchange + Phase 40-compatible replay projection, the memory-continuity adapter never exposes raw transcript or sensitive facts, and every selected_result_metadata flag (`produced_audio`, `invoked_tts`, `used_subprocess`, `used_network`, `wrote_files`) is False. The replay matrix collects every per-trace projection into a Phase 40-compatible matrix without modifying Phase 40 or re-invoking any adapter. The drift-stability matrix checks adapter-selection drift, production-baseline drift (read-only DB COUNT), boundary drift, and Phase 21 staging-folder state (warn-only, never imported). The operator packet bundles everything into a single readable JSON + Markdown.

## Files created

### Phase 42 source modules (8)

1. `bilingual_voice_phase42_audit_contract.py`
2. `bilingual_voice_phase42_scenario_builder.py`
3. `bilingual_voice_phase42_trace_runner.py`
4. `bilingual_voice_phase42_coherence_auditor.py`
5. `bilingual_voice_phase42_replay_matrix.py`
6. `bilingual_voice_phase42_drift_stability_matrix.py`
7. `bilingual_voice_phase42_operator_packet.py`
8. `bilingual_voice_phase42_runtime.py`

### Harness + report

9. `test_phase42_multi_trace_coherence_audit.py` (suites A-K, **560 checks**)
10. `PHASE42_MULTI_TRACE_COHERENCE_AUDIT_REPORT.md` (this file)

### Generated artifacts under `bilingual_stack/voice_adapter_phase42/`

- `contracts/audit_contract.json`
- `trace_runs/trace_batch.json`
- `coherence_audits/coherence_audit.json`
- `replay_projections/replay_matrix.json`
- `drift_matrices/drift_stability_matrix.json`
- `operator_packets/operator_packet.json`
- `dashboards/OPERATOR_PACKET.md`
- Other folders (`governance_rechecks/`, `reports/`, `fixtures/`, `demos/`) created and reserved.

## Public API surface (one line each)

- **`bilingual_voice_phase42_audit_contract`** — schema + create/validate contract; required scenarios (8); required adapter coverage (5); 20 forbidden actions; scenario count clamped 1..12.
- **`bilingual_voice_phase42_scenario_builder`** — builds 8 canonical scenarios; rejects 14 banned scenario fields; voice_memory_state sanitized.
- **`bilingual_voice_phase42_trace_runner`** — runs each scenario via Phase 41 runtime; emits bounded result with `selected_result_metadata` + `replay_projection_summary`; raw operator_id never appears.
- **`bilingual_voice_phase42_coherence_auditor`** — 6 sub-audits: adapter coverage, status coherence, evidence coherence, replay-projection coherence, memory privacy, boundary preservation.
- **`bilingual_voice_phase42_replay_matrix`** — Phase 40-compatible matrix; per-scenario trace_hash + selection + governance + baseline + Phase 21; no Phase 40 modification, no adapter re-invocation.
- **`bilingual_voice_phase42_drift_stability_matrix`** — 4 drift checks: adapter-selection drift (fail), baseline drift via read-only DB COUNT (fail), boundary drift (fail), Phase 21 staging-folder state (warn-only).
- **`bilingual_voice_phase42_operator_packet`** — final bundled JSON + Markdown; 14 banned fields rejected.
- **`bilingual_voice_phase42_runtime`** — single entry point `run_phase42_multi_trace_audit(operator_id, output_dir=None, limit=12)`.

## 8 canonical scenarios

| ID | Type | Expected adapter | Expected status |
|---|---|---|---|
| P42-S01 | simple_english | dummy_metadata_adapter | ok |
| P42-S02 | russian_first | bilingual_segment_metadata_adapter | ok |
| P42-S03 | mixed_code_switch | bilingual_segment_metadata_adapter | ok |
| P42-S04 | high_prosody | prosody_density_metadata_adapter | ok |
| P42-S05 | safety_redaction | safety_redaction_trace_metadata_adapter | ok |
| P42-S06 | memory_continuity | memory_continuity_audit_metadata_adapter | ok |
| P42-S07 | approve_false_refusal | (none) | refused |
| P42-S08 | kill_switch_refusal | (none) | kill_switch_blocked |

Observed clean run: 6 ok + 1 refused + 1 kill-switch-blocked. Adapter distribution covers all 5 Phase 41 adapters (dummy=1, bilingual_segment=4 [S02, S03, plus segment-routed S07/S08 selection before refusal/block], prosody_density=1, safety_redaction_trace=1, memory_continuity_audit=1). Coherence audit: `adapter_coverage_ok=True`, `status_coherence_ok=True`, `evidence_coherence_ok=True`, `replay_projection_coherence_ok=True`, `memory_privacy_ok=True`, `boundary_preservation_ok=True`.

## Harness results

**Phase 42: 560 / 560 PASS, 0 FAIL** across 11 suites (A pre-flight, B audit contract, C scenario builder, D trace runner, E coherence auditor, F replay matrix, G drift-stability matrix, H operator packet, I Phase 42 runtime end-to-end, J production safety + isolation, K regression smoke).

Zero failures across 35 harnesses.

## Production-invariant verification

| Invariant | Expected | Observed |
|---|---|---|
| English words | 2814 | 2814 |
| Russian words | 2518 | 2518 |
| Russian phrases | 35 | 35 |
| Bilingual concepts | 26 | 26 |
| Bilingual entry links | 52 | 52 |
| Live pack manifests | 90 | 90 |
| Audio files under `voice_adapter_phase42/` | 0 | 0 |
| `corpus_sources/english/incoming/` files | 0 | 0 |
| `corpus_sources/russian/incoming/` files | 0 | 0 |

## Phase 21 import status

**Unchanged: BLOCKED.** Both incoming folders empty. Phase 42 lists staging folders read-only; if files ever appear, drift matrix reports `STAGED_AWAITING_OPERATOR` as `warn` (never `fail`) and refuses to import. Operator must still run Phase 21 explicitly.

## Boundaries enforced

- **No new adapter** — the five Phase 41 adapters are the only callable surface.
- **No audio**: zero audio files under `voice_adapter_phase42/`; coherence audit confirms every successful result has `produced_audio=False`.
- **No TTS / audio library imports**: runtime-assembled forbidden-token scan over all 8 Phase 42 modules and the harness — zero matches.
- **No subprocess / PowerShell / SAPI / Piper**: zero matches.
- **No network / sockets**: zero matches.
- **No multiprocessing / threading / daemon / scheduler**: zero matches.
- **No Luna main-runtime integration**: zero `luna_modules` / `worker.py` / `tier_*` / `probe_*` / `attestation*` imports; runtime-assembled in `isolation_summary` key names.
- **No raw transcript / sensitive facts**: scenario builder, trace runner, coherence auditor, replay matrix, drift matrix, and operator packet each reject 14+ banned field names if non-empty/non-False.
- **No raw operator_id, no signing material**: trace results carry only `selected_result_metadata` flags + `replay_projection_summary` (trace_hash + status text); operator_id is hashed by Phase 29 internally and never re-exposed.
- **No production DB writes**: baseline drift check uses `sqlite3.connect` + `SELECT COUNT(*)` + `close()` only.
- **No corpus import**: Phase 21 remains BLOCKED.
- **35-harness regression confirms** no upstream module was broken by Phase 42.

## Files modified
None outside Phase 42. No Phase 27–41 file edited. No Program S / `worker.py` / `luna_modules` / `tier_*` / `probe_*` / `attestation*` touched.

## Rollback

To roll back Phase 42: delete the 10 Phase 42 files (8 modules + harness + report) and the 12 sub-folders under `bilingual_stack/voice_adapter_phase42/`. Phases 27–41 remain green — no prior file modified, no upstream module imports any Phase 42 module. No destructive command auto-executed.

## Next recommended phase

1. **Phase 43 — cross-machine continuity portability harness** that bundles a Phase 42 audit as a portable witness package and re-verifies on a fresh checkout.
2. **Phase 41a — continuity-ledger** that records per-session memory-continuity audit summaries (metadata-only, bounded) under `voice_adapter_phase41/continuity_audits/`.
3. **Phase 21 real corpus import unblock** — separate workflow; operator drops files into `corpus_sources/{english,russian}/incoming/` and runs Phase 21 explicitly.

---

_Generated by Phase 42 multi-trace cross-rehearsal coherence audit pass._

# Phase 43 - Cross-Machine Continuity Portability Harness, Portable Witness Bundle, Fresh-Checkout Verification Contract, and Phase 42 Audit Reverification

## Status: COMPLETE

Phase 43 ships an 8-module portability layer that packages a Phase 42 multi-trace audit into a portable local witness bundle and verifies it as if on a fresh checkout — without reading runtime DBs, invoking adapters, opening sockets, spawning subprocesses, or generating audio. Phase 43 harness: **612 / 612 PASS, 0 FAIL**. Full 36-harness regression: **9426 / 9426 PASS, 0 FAIL**.

## What Phase 43 is, in one paragraph

Phase 43 collects the 8 Phase 42 artifacts (audit contract, trace batch, coherence audit, replay matrix, drift-stability matrix, operator packet, operator markdown, Phase 42 report) into a portable bundle. Every artifact is read with bounded I/O (size capped at 2 MB per file with inline content stored only when ≤ 512 KB), hashed via streaming SHA-256, and packaged with declared boundary claims, expected production baselines, and Phase 21 status. The bundle manifest carries content-addressed hash roots and rejects any tampering. The fresh-checkout verifier runs five independent sub-checks (presence, hash, Phase 42 claims, boundary claims, Phase 21 claim) using only the bundle's inline content — it never imports `sqlite3`, never opens a connection, never invokes any adapter. The portability auditor catches runtime-DB inclusion, audio inclusion, secret leakage, command fields, and adapter-reinvocation claims. The operator packet + dashboard bundle every result into a readable JSON + Markdown.

## Public API surface (one line each)

- **`bilingual_voice_phase43_portability_contract`** — schema + 10 required bundle artifacts + 14 excluded patterns + 21 forbidden actions (runtime-assembled); `fresh_checkout_no_adapter_reinvocation=True` invariant.
- **`bilingual_voice_phase43_bundle_builder`** — collects 8 Phase 42 artifacts, streaming SHA-256, 512 KB inline cap, 2 MB hash cap, excludes runtime DBs / audio / secrets / corpus incoming / .claude / backups / local_secret_handoff via relative-path pattern matching.
- **`bilingual_voice_phase43_bundle_manifest`** — content-addressed manifest with `manifest_root_hash`; verifies bundle/manifest pair; detects per-artifact hash drift, missing artifact, runtime-DB reference, bad hash format, manifest root drift.
- **`bilingual_voice_phase43_fresh_checkout_verifier`** — 5 sub-checks (presence, hash, Phase 42 claims, boundary, Phase 21); imports only `hashlib` and `json`; never imports `sqlite3`; never invokes an adapter.
- **`bilingual_voice_phase43_portability_auditor`** — 7 audit checks (runtime-DB, audio, excluded artifacts, secret leakage, adapter-reinvocation claim, command fields, Phase 21 metadata); Phase 21 staged status is warn-only.
- **`bilingual_voice_phase43_operator_packet`** — bundles everything into a single JSON + Markdown packet; 14 banned fields rejected; Phase 21 status surfaced; rollback + next-phase guidance.
- **`bilingual_voice_phase43_status_dashboard`** — static dashboard with adapter allowlist (still 5), 20 forbidden boundaries (runtime-assembled), source `phase42`, hash + fresh-checkout statuses.
- **`bilingual_voice_phase43_runtime`** — single entry point `run_phase43_portability_harness(output_dir=None)`; writes 9 artifacts when `output_dir` is provided; status logic: `ok` only when every sub-validator + fresh-checkout + portability audit pass.

# Phase 44 - Cross-Machine Bundle Import Simulation, Fresh-Checkout Regression Harness, Portable Verification Round Trip, and No-Runtime-State Boundary

## Status: COMPLETE

Phase 44 ships a 9-module cross-machine import simulation layer that takes the Phase 43 portable witness bundle, copies it into a clean local fresh-checkout simulation workspace, verifies it from that workspace alone (no production DB reads, no adapter invocation, no subprocess/network/multiprocessing), runs 8 controlled tamper cases through the verifier and confirms each is detected, and emits a single roundtrip receipt + operator packet + dashboard. Phase 44 harness: **581 / 581 PASS, 0 FAIL**. Full 37-harness regression: **10007 / 10007 PASS, 0 FAIL**.

## What Phase 44 is, in one paragraph

Phase 44 simulates an operator copying the Phase 43 bundle to a different machine. The bundle importer rejects URL-shaped paths, path-traversal, shell metacharacters, runtime-DB / audio extensions, and exclusion-pattern paths; copies only the 5 source artifacts (portable bundle, bundle manifest, source operator packet, source status dashboard, source Phase 43 report) into a per-run workspace under `bilingual_stack/voice_adapter_phase44/fresh_checkout_simulation/workspace_<ts>/artifacts/`; re-derives streaming SHA-256 hashes after the copy and verifies they match the source. The import manifest is content-addressed (SHA-256 over the imported hash dict) and re-derives the source manifest root hash from the imported portable bundle artifact. The fresh-import verifier runs five sub-checks (presence, hash, boundary, Phase 21, no-runtime-state) using only the imported files. The tamper suite injects 8 controlled tampering scenarios, each on a deep copy, and confirms the verifier catches all 8. The roundtrip receipt + operator packet + dashboard summarize the entire round trip.
